derived_geometry.formula: row_pitch_m = collector_width_m * cos(tilt) + front_clear_gap_m; gcr = collector_width_m / row_pitch_m

module_height_m.method: mean of the surveyed module-edge heights at the RSI mounting points (pyranometer height + 29 cm gap equals the module rear surface at that point)

derived_geometry.rejected_interpretation: Reading the 2.50 m front spacing as centre-to-centre pitch would give gcr = 2.0 (> 1), which is physically impossible; the survey value is therefore interpreted as the clear gap between rows.
